questionHtml: If a zucchini is allowed to dry in the open air, predict how the osmolarity of the zucchini cells would change.
markschemeHtml:
osmolarity will increase «because the cells become dehydrated»
OR
the cells become hypertonic ✔

Accept water potential of the tissue decreases.
Do not accept "change" instead of "increase".

meta.title: If a zucchini is allowed to dry in the open air, predict how the osmolarity of the zucchini cells would change.
